meaning: vt.装载过多,负担过多,使过劳n.过重的负担
examples: Protein supplements may overburden some internal organ, thus leading to its malfunctioning.
A spokesman for his aquarium said. "We do not want to overburden him."
In India's cities a traffic accident on one street will quickly overburden alternative routes.
Montgomerie also took the opportunity to ask Europe's Ryder Cup skipper Ian Woosnam not to overburden Europe's players at the K Club.
The first twenty-five metres was overburden, dirt.
